description_long: This Christmas tree is a lush, conical evergreen with dense, layered branches dusted in artificial snow, giving it a wintry appearance. The tree is adorned with a variety of colorful ornaments, including red, yellow, and white baubles, which are distributed evenly throughout the branches. At the very top, a large, golden star serves as a prominent tree topper, adding a festive focal point. The branches are full and bushy, with the snow effect creating a striking contrast against the dark green needles. No string lights or tinsel are visible, and the base of the tree is not shown, suggesting it is intended for display in public urban spaces. There are no visible gift boxes or presents placed beneath the tree.
description: A snow-dusted, ornamented Christmas tree with a golden star topper and colorful baubles, featuring dense, dark green branches. The tree exudes a festive, wintry charm suitable for urban holiday displays.
description_view_0: Front view showing the golden star topper, dense snow-covered branches, and a variety of colorful ornaments prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tree's conical shape, with ornaments and snow distributed along the visible branches.
description_view_2: Rear view with the star topper visible, showing a slightly different arrangement of ornaments and heavy snow coverage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, displaying fewer ornaments and a more pronounced snow effect on the branches.
